svg.text: STATUS LIFECYCLE — the state machine per notification
count = MAX → FAILED is terminal (give up, alert)
→ O(1) status lookup, safe under sends
ExecutorService — deliver off the hot path

g.text: add random jitter → no thundering herd
cap max backoff · circuit-break a dead channel.
an OTP jumps the line ahead of a
in a ConcurrentHashMap / Redis SET w/ TTL.

svg.text: swap the in-memory queue for Kafka / RabbitMQ,
partition by userId for ordering, scale consumers.
only the implementation behind it does.
① client send → ② gateway builds + enqueues (priority) → ③ worker polls highest-priority → ④ Strategy fan-out to channels (Template Method skeleton) → status walks PENDING → SENT / FAILED → RETRYING

g.text: Patterns: Strategy · Template Method · Factory · Observer
